diagrams.title: Insertion Sort Pass Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how array transforms through each iteration - sorted portion grows from left
diagrams.purpose: Understand incremental building of sorted array - each pass extends sorted portion by one element

diagrams.title: Worst Case Reverse Sort
diagrams.description: Reverse sorted array [5,4,3,2,1] showing maximum comparisons and shifts at each step
diagrams.purpose: Visualize worst-case behavior and derive O(n²) complexity through summation

diagrams.title: Best Case Already Sorted
diagrams.description: Already sorted array [1,2,3,4,5] showing immediate termination of inner loop
elements: Each key compares only once with predecessor
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate adaptive behavior and understand O(n) best-case condition
